name: hiredvideo-chrome-extension
description: Chrome extensions (Job Seeker + Recruiter) for the hired.video platform.

scripts.dev:jobseeker: concurrently -k -n build,web-ext -c blue,green "npm run watch:jobseeker" "web-ext run --source-dir=dist/jobseeker --target=chromium"
scripts.dev:recruiter: concurrently -k -n build,web-ext -c blue,green "npm run watch:recruiter" "web-ext run --source-dir=dist/recruiter --target=chromium"
